subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Your numerous letters were received and read with utmost care, but due to the abundance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مکاتیب متعدده آنجناب واصل و بدقت تمام قرائت شد ولی از کثرت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
